title: Big Globe Compat - Moog's Voyager Structures
description: This datapack adds compatibility between Moog's Voyager Structures and Big Globe.
body:
This datapack adds all of the structures from Moog's Voyager Structures to the terrain generation for Big Globe.

There are a couple of floating structures that will only generate within a range of 20 blocks above skylands and the max world height. They generate specifically over skylands, so look for them in the ocean biomes.
